3090807.title: SpongeBob
3090807.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3090880.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3090880.description: Bug Felicity discovers her favorite snack has been sabotaged so she takes matters into her own hands by visiting the Snacktory. // The Backwards Bug bites Miguel and Athena, causing them to speak backwards until their friends can find the cure.

3090942.title: Regenboog Vlinder Eenhoorn Kitten
3090942.description: Miguel invites Chippy, a cute chipmunk-like creature, to join him and Felicity on their friend-iversary, but Chippy isn't all she seems! // Felicity tries a little too hard to be purr-fect and somehow loses both her powers and her confidence.

3091012.title: Dorg van Dango
3091012.description: When the gang use their powers to get Normill's very last pickle out of an ancient jar, they're left chasing a giant runaway pickle jar through town! // Dorg gets a job rounding up shopping carts at the mall, but Patronella brings the carts to life!

3091542.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3091542.description: It's a special day when Bada and Bing get a shipment of delicious plantains to eat. Although they jealously guard the African bananas, King Julien's determined to taste them too. // Skipper's losing it. He has to prove he can still lead the squad.

3091586.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3091586.description: The Space Agency sends Private to the moon. His ticket is downgraded to one-way and the other birds can't monkey around if they hope to get him home again. // Snowmageddon hits and traps Skipper and Marlene in the convenience store with X.

3091644.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3091644.description: Donatello breaks into a secret Kraang detention center in order to rescue Kirby O'Neil. But when he discovers they are trapped inside with a deadly mutant prisoner, he realizes that breaking in was the easy part.

3091686.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
3091686.description: As the Turtles make a desperate assault on TCRI to shut down an alien portal, they find themselves engaging in the most difficult battle yet.

3091741.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3091741.description: Dad refuses to sell Sparky to his boss so he makes Dad's life miserable at work. Timmy and Sparky hatch a plan. // Timmy wishes his ancestors had picked different careers. Timmy's family becomes rich and spoiled.

3092504.title: Fairly Odd Parents
3092504.description: Dad and Crocker make a deal. As a result, Crocker becomes best friends with Dinkleberg.

3092545.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3092545.description: When Alvin is paired with Simon for a Science project, he accidentally creates a potion that turns Theodore into a 30-foot giant.

3092563.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3092563.description: All the kids at school are obsessed with their virtual dogs on their smart phones. But when all the phones wind up missing, Alvin is blamed for the theft and has to follow the clues to find the real culprit and clear his name.

3092611.title: SpongeBob
3092611.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3092643.title: SpongeBob
3092643.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3092694.title: SpongeBob
3092694.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3092737.title: SpongeBob
3092737.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3093379.title: SpongeBob
3093379.description: SpongeBob SquarePants is een gele zeespons die diep in de oceaan leeft in het onderwaterstadje Bikinibroek. Samen met zijn maatje Patrick de roze zeester beleeft SpongeBob de gekste en spannendste avonturen.

3093436.title: SpongeBob
3093436.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelschap van vrienden en van zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.

3093552.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3093552.description: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. So, with the help of Theodore and a VERY reluctant Simon, Alvin sets about proving it.

3093564.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3093564.description: Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave because he has tickets to the big soccer match.

3094308.title: Alvin en de Chipmunks
3094308.description: When Dave gets a parenting APP to help supervise The Chipmunks, Alvin tries everything to escape its control.

3094354.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3094354.description: King Julien observes children chasing each other, calling out "cooties". He deduces that girls pass this wretched "cooties" with a simple touch. // When Rico crashes the Penguins car and rebuilds it himself, it becomes "possessed" and targets Rico.

3094446.title: Les pingouins de Madagascar
3094446.description: The Amarillo Kid confronts the penguins looking for the infamous Mr. Tux. Apparently the two have a score to settle. // Private is ready to move up in rank within the penguin commando unit, or is he? First he'll have to become a First Class Private.

3094493.title: The Loud House
3094493.description: Lincoln has to get to school on time but getting his sisters out the door proves to be the biggest obstacle of all. // Lincoln is the deciding vote on going to the beach or the amusement park for their family vacation.

3095291.title: The Loud House
3095291.description: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

3095372.title: De Casagrandes
3095372.description: Ronnie Anne and Sid are pumped up for their sleepover, but Carl and Adelaide might ruin the day! // After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

3095422.title: De Casagrandes
3095422.description: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him!

3095495.title: SpongeBob
3095495.description: SpongeBob is een vierkante, gele zeespons die in een grote ananas op de bodem van de oceaan woont. In de plaats Bikinibroek heeft hij het gezelscahp van vrienden en zijn huisdier, Gerrit de slak.
